sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الْأَطْفَالَ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَلْعَبُوا فِي الْهَوَاءِ الطَّلْقِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da djeca trebaju igrati na svježem zraku.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that children should play in the open air.

sentences.arabic: اللَّعِبُ خَارِجَ الْبَيْتِ يُقَوِّي الْجِسْمَ وَيُنَشِّطُ الْعَقْلَ.
sentences.translation: Igranje vani jača tijelo i aktivira um.
sentences.translationEn: Playing outside strengthens the body and activates the mind.

sentences.arabic: الشَّاشَاتُ مُفِيدَةٌ لَكِنَّ كَثِيرًا مِنْهَا يَضُرُّ.
sentences.translation: Ekrani su korisni ali previše ih šteti.
sentences.translationEn: Screens are useful but too much of them is harmful.

sentences.arabic: أُفَضِّلُ أَنْ يَلْعَبَ الطِّفْلُ بَعْضَ الْوَقْتِ بِدُونِ شَاشَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Više volim da se dijete igraji dio vremena bez ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: I prefer that a child plays for some time without screens.
